heading: Termination of appointments of consular agents and foreign national employees
label: 4012 Termination of appointments of consular agents and foreign national employees
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 614 and is classified to .section 613 of Pub. L. 96–465section 4013 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: The Secretary of State may terminate at any time the appointment of any consular agent in light of the criteria and procedures normally followed in the locality in similar circumstances.

children.label: b
children.text: The Secretary may terminate at any time the appointment of any foreign national employee in light of the criteria and procedures normally followed in the locality in similar circumstances.
